# Sample Project

A minimal sample project demonstrating pipeline integration.

## Overview

This project implements a small Python/ROS2 node for the demo.

## Tech Stack

- Python 3.12
- ROS2 Humble
- CMake

## Project Structure

```
sample-project/
  src/         Python sources
  launch/      ROS2 launch files
  package.xml  ROS2 package manifest
```
